channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.description:

- U.K. PM Starmer told by Interior Minister to consider departure
- U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer rejects mounting calls to resign
- Over 100 British Labour lawmakers back Starmer as fourth minister resigns
- UK PM Starmer defiant as calls to quit grow
- Starmer defiant as calls for his resignation grow, several ministers quit
- PM Starmer under pressure as four ministers resign
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as four junior ministers quit
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as four junior ministers quit
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as three junior ministers quit
- Third minister quits as pressure mounts on Starmer's premiership
- Pressure grows on United Kingdom’s Starmer to quit as prime minister
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as three junior ministers quit
- UK’s Starmer Doubles Down on Pledge to Stay in Office as Pressure Mounts
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as two junior ministers quit
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as two junior ministers quit
- UK PM Starmer defiant as quit calls grow
- UK's Starmer defiant as calls for his resignation grow and a minister quits
- UK junior minister Miatta Fahnbulleh resigns, urges PM Starmer to set exit timetable
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as first junior minister resigns
- British Prime Minister Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will not resign
- ‘You have lost trust of public’: UK min quits, calls grow for PM Starmer to resign
- UK: Keir Starmer tells Cabinet he will continue in place, as first junior minister resigns
- Starmer doubles down on his resolve to stay in office despite calls in UK for him step down
- UK junior minister resigns and calls for Starmer to step down
- Keir Starmer to face crucial cabinet meeting as ministers and MPs urge him to resign – UK politics live
- Pressure grows on UK's Starmer to quit as Prime Minister
- Pressure grows on Starmer to resign
- Cabinet ministers urge Starmer to set resignation timetable
- Starmer faces resignation calls from 70 Labour MPs]]>

item.title: US and UK discuss reopening Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Battle Over the Strait of Hormuz Leaves Safe Passage a Gamble
- Situation around Strait of Hormuz shows importance of protecting sovereignty — MFA
- The battle for Hormuz risks sparking the next Iran clash]]>
